name: frostbyte
description: Frostbyte project tracking inside Claude Code — your coding agent keeps tasks, decisions, and releases in sync as a side-effect of building.

api_token.title: Frostbyte API token
api_token.description: Generate at https://getfrostbyte.dev/settings → AI Agents → Generate token. Plaintext is shown once; copy it now and paste it here.

endpoint.title: Frostbyte API endpoint
endpoint.description: Override only for local dev or self-host (e.g. http://localhost:4000).
